data.title: Legal threats issued as Fetch.ai CEO accuses Ocean Protocol of mishandling ASI tokens. Binance restricts deposits amid feud.
data.description: The CEO of Fetch.ai, Humayun Sheikh, has alleged that Ocean Protocol mishandled ASI tokens. Sheikh has vowed to support class-action lawsuits to reveal the truth behind the matter.

data.title: Industrial X Unleashed event features leading companies showcasing real-world applications of Industrial AI on Nov 13, 2025 in New York.
data.description: Leading companies such as IFS, Anthropic, Boston Dynamics, MIT CISR, Microsoft, PwC, and Siemens are set to present cutting-edge real-world applications of Industrial AI at a showcase event on November 13, 2025, in New York. This event will shed light on the future landscape of innovation and the transformative impact of AI technologies. Mark your calendars for a glimpse into the groundbreaking developments shaping industries.

data.title: Belgium's data center market shows promise with key locations, existing & upcoming floor space, & IT load capacity. Leading operators include Digital Realty, EdgeConneX, LCL, & Datacenter United. Upcoming power capacity expansions aim to enhance digital infrastructure readiness for AI, HPC, & cloud workloads. Players like KEVLINX and LC contributing to developments. Retail & wholesale pricing also analyzed.
data.description: A new database, "Belgium Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio," has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The data shows that the majority of the current Rack capacity is centered in Brussels. Key data center operators in Belgium include Digital Realty, EdgeConneX, LCL, and Datacenter United. The expanding power capacity expected in upcoming projects will enhance Belgium's digital infrastructure preparedness for Artificial Intelligence (AI), High-Performance Computing (HPC), and cloud workloads. Noteworthy developments are anticipated from companies such as KEVLINX and LC, aiming to further strengthen the data center market in Belgium.

data.title: Portugal's colocation data center market booming with upcoming capacity 6x larger than existing, over 50,000 racks expected. Lisbon set to lead in new developments.
data.description: Dublin - A recent addition to the ResearchAndMarkets.com database is the "Portugal Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio." The upcoming data center power capacity is projected to exceed the existing capacity by more than sixfold. It is anticipated that the total upcoming rack capacity will surpass 50,000 racks. The major upcoming data center developers in Portugal are Start Campus and Merlin Properties in collaboration with Edged Energy. Lisbon is expected to be the primary location dominating the upcoming data center market in the region.

data.title: L.A. Works gets grant from Elizabeth R. Koch Foundation to boost volunteerism in L.A., one of 50 nonprofits selected.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, L.A. Works, a prominent volunteer mobilization organization in Los Angeles, revealed that it is among the 50 nonprofits in Los Angeles County chosen to receive funding from the Elizabeth R. Koch Foundation. This grant ensures that L.A. Works can sustain its operations and further support the community.

data.title: Dow Jones climbs over 100 points, Charles Schwab beats earnings expectations with EPS of $1.31 (+70% Y/Y) and sales of $6.135 billion (+27% Y/Y).
data.description: Stocks in the U.S. saw a positive start today, as the Dow Jones index surged over 100 points on Thursday. At the opening bell, the Dow rose by 0.34% to 46,412.27 points, while the NASDAQ climbed 0.73% to 22,834.55 and the S&P 500 gained 0.41% to reach 6,698.54. Communication services sector shares experienced a significant increase of 1.4%, whereas financial stocks faced a decline of 0.7% during Thursday's trading session. In terms of notable news, the Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE: SCHW) announced impressive results for the third quarter, with adjusted earnings per share at $1.31, marking a 70% increase year over year and surpassing the analyst forecast of $1.25. The company's quarterly sales also exceeded expectations, standing at $6.135 billion, a 27% rise from the previous year and beating the expected $6.009 billion. Specific details on equities trading, including Praxis Precision Medicines Inc (NASDAQ: PRAX), can be found on well-known financial news platform.

data.title: Dunamis Premium Spirits to join 2025 Harrah's Cherokee Casino Tasting & Trade Show on Oct 18 from 1-7 PM. Limited to 80 vendors.
data.description: A liquor company called Dunamis Premium Spirits from Zephyrhills, Florida will take part in the 2025 Tasting and Trade Show at Harrah's Cherokee Casino Resort on October 18, 2025, running from 1 PM to 7:00 PM. This event is exclusive, with only 80 vendor slots available.

data.title: Rhyme and Microsoft team up for touchless prior auth via Dragon Copilot, aiming to slash treatment time and costs.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on October 16, 2025, Rhyme revealed a new partnership with Microsoft. This collaboration will involve integrating with Microsoft Dragon Copilot to showcase the effectiveness of touchless prior authorization at the point of care. The aim is to show how this method can lead to a notable decrease in time to treatment and a reduction in costs across the healthcare industry.

data.title: Coleridge Initiative appoints 3 new board members enhancing expertise in data science, governance, and cybersecurity.
data.description: Today, the Coleridge Initiative welcomed three new members to its Board of Directors, further enhancing the organization's proficiency in data science, governance, and cybersecurity leadership. Robert L. Santos is among the newly appointed distinguished leaders. This development comes on October 16, 2025, in Washington.

data.title: Progress update on Stargate UAE AI infrastructure cluster part of 5GW UAE-US AI Campus in Abu Dhabi by G42; 1GW large-scale development by Khazna Data Centers.
data.description: In Abu Dhabi, the Stargate UAE project, part of the 5GW UAE–U.S. AI Campus, is advancing rapidly. G42 revealed significant updates on the development of this 1GW AI infrastructure cluster, being constructed by Khazna Data Centers, a subsidiary of G42.

data.title: Bell Techlogix unveils brand identity for AI capabilities: Infiniti AI Solutions. Transforming IT services.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, Bell Techlogix, a prominent IT managed services and solutions provider based in Indianapolis, unveiled its advanced artificial intelligence offerings under the brand name Bell Techlogix Infiniti AI Solutions. This new identity marks a significant milestone in the company's AI development, solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: Pharmacy groups release guiding principles for state policy on pharmacy personnel-administered vaccines, 12 organizations involved.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, a coalition called the Pharmacy-based Vaccine Access Work Group, comprised of representatives from 12 organizations in various pharmacy practice settings, released a set of principles for state policy regarding pharmacy personnel administering vaccines. This initiative aims to establish a framework for the involvement of pharmacy staff in vaccine administration. The group's recommendations were put forth collaboratively and emphasize the importance of ensuring access to vaccines through pharmacies.
